Undergraduate Student Study Dashboard Academic Progress Visualization System
📊 Academic Progress Visualization · v3.0

Undergraduate Student Study Dashboard

Understand your course portfolio, track skill development, and discover the right courses to achieve your academic goals.

🚀 Enter Dashboard 📖 User Guide
308
Courses Analyzed
11
Schools / Depts
99
Major-skill Dimensions
9
General Competencies

What Can You Do?

Five tools to help you understand and plan your academic journey

📚

Course Portfolio + Skill Bars

Click courses to build your portfolio — see Major Skills and General Skills side by side. Bars use a single-hue blue gradient with 25 / 55 / 75 maturity markers.

Side-by-side Bar Charts
🎯

Skill Goal Advisor

Pick a target skill — the system ranks courses that build it most efficiently. Filter by your school and term to see only what's actually offered.

Term & School Aware
📈

Grade Trajectory

Plot every course's letter grade, your semester GPA, current CGPA, and goal GPA on one chart — see your trend at a glance.

CGPA · Semester GPA · Goal
📥

Transcript Import / Export

Drop your transcript Excel/CSV — courses auto-fill into the portfolio. Export your full skill profile to Excel with one click.

Excel · CSV
🔍

Skill Matrix

Browse all 308 courses in a sortable heatmap across 99 major-skill dimensions and 9 general competencies. Click any column header to sort.

Sortable · Filterable
🏫

Multi-school Filter

Combine multiple departments at once. Compare your skill profile against any subset of schools — useful for double majors and minors.

11 Departments

11 Schools / Departments Covered

9 specialized skill dimensions per department, plus 9 universal General Skills

22

ACT

Accounting · Financial Reporting, Auditing, Taxation, Data Analytics

21

HSS

Humanities & Social Sciences · Critical thinking, Cultural analysis, Research

5

MED

Medicine & Life Sciences · Scientific foundations, Lab, Bioethics

42

MAT

Mathematics · Calculus, Linear Algebra, Probability & Stats, Numerical Methods

28

MGT

Management · Strategy, OB, Operations, Leadership, Sustainability

20

MKT

Marketing · Consumer Behavior, Brand Strategy, Digital Marketing

40

CSC

Computer Science · Programming, Algorithms, AI/ML, Databases, Security

19

FIN

Finance · Corporate Finance, Investments, Asset Pricing, Derivatives

5

MIS

Mgmt Info Systems · AI for Business, LLMs, Process Automation

88

GE

General Education · Humanities, Science, Society, Ethics, Global

18

PED

Physical Education · Cardio, Strength, Flexibility, Team / Individual sports

Ready to explore your academic profile?

Enter the dashboard to start building your course portfolio and discover your skill map.
